globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' cdnjs.cloudflare.com code.jquery.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' cdnjs.cloudflare.com fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: *.instagram.com cdnjs.cloudflare.com; frame-src www.instagram.com linktr.ee; connect-src 'self'
